raise-error.description: Cham Orders API authentication response did not include the required token information.

http:request.doc:name: Retrieve Cham Orders page
http:request.http:query-params: #[output application/java --- { status: vars.syncStatus, page: vars.currentPage as String, size: vars.pageSize as String }]

when.expression: #[ vars.ordersPage.content == null or vars.ordersPage.page == null or vars.ordersPage.size == null or vars.ordersPage.totalElements == null or vars.ordersPage.totalPages == null or vars.ordersPage.first == null or vars.ordersPage.last == null ]

raise-error.description: Cham Orders API returned an invalid paginated orders response.

logger.doc:name: Log retrieved orders page
logger.message: #[write({ message: 'Cham Orders page retrieved', correlationId: correlationId, page: vars.ordersPage.page, size: vars.ordersPage.size, orders: sizeOf(vars.ordersPage.content default []), totalElements: vars.ordersPage.totalElements, totalPages: vars.ordersPage.totalPages, first: vars.ordersPage.first, last: vars.ordersPage.last }, 'application/json')]
